name: india-market-monitor
description: India Market Monitor — a production-grade local news & filings terminal for Indian equities (NSE/BSE/SEBI + the financial press), with local AI thesis-scoring.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev --workspace api" "npm run dev --workspace web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace api && npm run build --workspace web
